prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约17822名，2023年约19682名，两年间后移约1860名，呈持续后移趋势；2024–但结合安徽省物理类考生规模持续扩大，位次后 移趋势大概率延续，2025年基准位次估算约20500名；2022–2023年该校在安徽省理科/物理类招生计划均为22人，2026年招生计划仍为22人，连续多年计 划持平，招生规模稳定，对竞争格局无显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，军事类院校，位于陕西西安；软科主榜未进入前200名（军事类院校不参与排名） ，但学校在军队医学领域具有较高声誉；该校为军事类。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医 学、口腔医学等医学类专业在2023–2024年专业热度分析中持续处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"级别，社会报考热度高；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，按近年物理类占比约69. 5%估算，物理类考生约31.3万人，较2025年物理类32.1万人略有减少，竞争压力边际缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、招生计划连续多年持平、医学类专业社会热度持续高企等因素，在2025年基准位次约20500名基础上，医学类报考热 度升温对位次有上移压力（位次数字减小），而考生总数微降对位次有下移压力（位次数字增大），两相权衡后预计位次小幅上移；预测2026年最低位次约20420名，区间19920–2 0920名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5年）
- 口腔医学（5年）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物医学工程
- 药学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物技术
- 护理学
- 临床医学（本硕博连读8年）和口腔医学（本硕博连读8年）及基础医学（本硕博连读8年）为该校顶尖专业，位次要求远高于校线，2023年参考位次约2923–9059名，远超预测区间 ，建议高分考生冲刺
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间19920–20920名内，建议以二档专业（生物医学工程、药学）为主攻方向，一档专业（临床医学5年、口腔医学5年）可冲刺但需做好调剂准备，三档专业（护理学 、生物技术）作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<19920名）可重点冲击一档临床/口腔专业；注意该校仅招收普通高中应届毕业生且政治面貌须为共青团员或中共党员。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2022 was approximately 17822, and in 2023 approximately 19682, with a backward shift of about 1860 positions over two years, showing a continuous backward trend; from 2024 to 2025, combined with the continuous expansion of the number of physics category candidates in Anhui Province, the backward trend is likely to continue, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is estimated at about 20500; from 2022 to 2023, the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Anhui Province was 22 students each year, and the enrollment plan for 2026 remains 22 students, with the plan remaining stable for many consecutive years, and the enrollment scale is stable, having no significant impact on the competition pattern.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, a military academy, located in Xi'an, Shaanxi; it is not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main list (military academies are not included in the ranking), but the school has a high reputation in the field of military medicine; the school is military-affiliated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology have been consistently at the 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' level in the 2023–2024 major popularity analysis, with high social application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province general college entrance examination is about 451,000, and based on the recent physics category proportion of about 69.5%, the number of physics category candidates is about 313,000, a slight decrease from the 321,000 physics category candidates in 2025, marginally easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the stable enrollment plan for many consecutive years, and the persistently high social popularity of medical majors, based on the baseline ranking of about 20500 in 2025, the rising popularity of medical applications exerts upward pressure on rankings (ranking number decreases), while the slight decrease in the total number of candidates exerts downward pressure on rankings (ranking number increases); after balancing the two, the ranking is expected to rise slightly; the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 20420, with a range of 19920–20920.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5 years)
- Stomatology (5 years)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biotechnology
- Nursing
- Clinical Medicine (8-year combined bachelor's, master's, and doctoral program) and Stomatology (8-year combined bachelor's, master's, and doctoral program) and Basic Medicine (8-year combined bachelor's, master's, and doctoral program) are the top majors of the school, with ranking requirements far above the school line; the reference ranking in 2023 is about 2923–9059, far exceeding the predicted range, and high-scoring candidates are advised to aim for them
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19920–20920, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Biomedical Engineering, Pharmacy) as the main direction; Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 5 years, Stomatology 5 years) can be aimed for but with preparation for adjustment; Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Biotechnology) serve as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<19920), focus on aiming for Tier 1 clinical/stomatology majors; note that the school only admits regular high school graduates of the current year, and the political status must be a Communist Youth League member or a Communist Party member.

_translation.university_name_en: Air Force Medical University of the Chinese People's Liberation Army
